app.name: Landly
app.tagline: Your guide to life in Korea

onboarding.subtitle: Let's personalize your Korea experience
onboarding.step_need: What do you need help with first?
onboarding.step_need_subtitle: Landly will place this at the top of your home actions.
onboarding.need_airport_transport_desc: Find airport routes, transit passes, and your first 72-hour checklist.
onboarding.need_shopping_refund_desc: Check refund eligibility, save receipts, and prepare departure steps.
onboarding.need_hospital_pharmacy_desc: Find care options and prepare phrases before a clinic or pharmacy visit.
onboarding.need_korean_phrases_desc: Keep useful phrases ready for taxis, restaurants, shopping, and emergencies.
onboarding.need_long_stay_setup_desc: Plan registration, banking, phone, housing, documents, and daily life.
onboarding.need_emergency_help_desc: Keep SOS flows, urgent phone numbers, and emergency phrases close.
onboarding.v45_fast_start_subtitle: Pick your main mode now. Duration, city, and first need are optional and can be changed later in My.
onboarding.v45_optional_desc: You can skip this now. These choices only tune your Home recommendations.

home.situation_desc: Start from your real situation, then Landly opens the right route, phrase, checklist, or saved plan.
home.action_arrived_desc: Choose airport rail, bus, taxi, map apps, and your first 72-hour checklist.
home.action_refund: I need a tax refund check
home.action_refund_desc: Check eligibility before checkout, then keep receipts ready for departure.
home.action_care: I feel sick or need a pharmacy
home.action_care_desc: Check urgency, find care options, and prepare Korean phrases for staff.
home.action_sos: I lost something or need urgent help
home.action_sos_desc: Open 112, 119, 1330, lost-item help, and emergency phrase flows.
home.action_phrase: I need to say something in Korean
home.action_phrase_desc: Open taxi, restaurant, shopping, hospital, and emergency phrase sets.
home.action_stay: I am staying longer than a trip
home.action_stay_desc: Start your 90-day plan for ARC, phone, banking, housing, and documents.
home.my_saved_note: Saved plans, reminders, receipts, and documents stay in My.

assistant.title: Phrases
assistant.subtitle: Tap to copy or show to someone
assistant.what_to_say: What do you need to say?
assistant.quick_help: Open the right phrase set, copy Korean, or show a large card to staff.

life.title: Life Setup
life.subtitle: Your checklist for settling in Korea

my.title: My
my.saved_places_subtitle: Places you can quickly open again
my.saved_phrases_subtitle: Frequently used phrases kept in one place
my.continue_title: Pick up exactly where you left off
my.continue_description: Saved places, phrases, receipts, care options, documents, and dates now live together in My.
my.saved_items_hub_subtitle: Everything you saved across Landly is grouped by use case for fast review.

shop.refund_wallet_title: Your tax refund status at a glance
shop.refund_wallet_desc: Keep receipts, passport readiness, estimated refunds, and airport-day actions together.
shop.mock_receipt_scan_desc: Try a scan-like flow that fills the form with realistic refund details. Replace it with OCR later.

beta.title: Beta test guide
beta.subtitle: Test Landly like a real visitor

retention.stamp_loop: Turn useful actions into small wins

pass.arrival_assistant_subtitle: Start with one clear airport action path: choose a route, keep the Korean destination phrase ready, save the plan, and continue into your first 72 hours.

care_safety.title: Safety command center
care_safety.subtitle: Use this as an action guide, not a diagnosis. Choose the safest official route first.

stay.settlement_command_title: Your long-stay setup, ordered by what can block you next
stay.settlement_command_desc: Use this view to connect entry date, official deadlines, checklist progress, documents, and Calendar reminders.
stay.priority_lanes_desc: Landly reorders the checklist by your stay type so you do not start from a random admin list.

partners.title: Partner offers
partners.subtitle: Monetization-ready flows, still user-first
partners.disclosure: Some partner lanes may become affiliate, referral, commission, sponsored, or pilot revenue flows. Landly should always label the model and ask users to confirm official details before paying or booking.

trust.title: Trust Center
trust.subtitle: Official sources, confirmation status, and safer action checks.
trust.command_title: Know what to trust before you act
trust.command_desc: Landly marks official sources, curated guidance, demo data, partner offers, and items that still need confirmation.

smart_actions.title: Smart action engine
smart_actions.next_best: Landly picked your next best step
smart_actions.desc: Ranked from your onboarding priority, saved items, reminders, receipts, stay plan, and departure setup.

assistant_language.title: Language readiness
assistant_language.subtitle: Save essential Korean show-cards and jump into situation-based phrase kits.

offline.title: Offline safety kit
offline.subtitle: Prepare critical numbers, Korean show-cards, routes, receipts, care notes, and documents before signal gets weak.
offline.checklist: Before you rely on Landly offline

navigation.title: Map handoff
navigation.subtitle: Open Google Maps, NAVER Map, Korean phrases, and route backups from one place.
navigation.home_desc: Landly prepares Google Maps, NAVER Map, Korean phrases, and backup checks before you move.

language.support_full_desc: Menus and phrase cards are available in this language.
language.support_phrase_desc: Menus stay in English; phrase cards use this language when available.
language.support_partial_desc: Menus stay in English; essential phrases are partially translated.

Start with airport routes, map handoff,: Start with airport routes, map handoff, and the first 72-hour arrival checklist.
Confirm live pickup points, fares, and m: Confirm live pickup points, fares, and map routes before moving.
Check refund eligibility, save receipts,: Check refund eligibility, save receipts, and prepare passport/departure steps before checkout.
Confirm final tax-refund rules at the st: Confirm final tax-refund rules at the store or official source before paying.
Separate urgent symptoms from ordinary c: Separate urgent symptoms from ordinary clinic or pharmacy steps, then prepare a visit note.
Use emergency numbers first for severe s: Use emergency numbers first for severe symptoms; partner lanes never replace medical judgment.
Save essential show-to-staff phrases for: Save essential show-to-staff phrases for taxis, stores, clinics, and emergency moments.
Use translated phrases as communication: Use translated phrases as communication support, then confirm important details with staff.
Start settlement tasks for registration,: Start settlement tasks for registration, banking, phone, housing, documents, and deadlines.
Confirm visa, housing, banking, and immi: Confirm visa, housing, banking, and immigration details with official sources.
Keep 112, 119, 1330, scenarios, and emer: Keep 112, 119, 1330, scenarios, and emergency Korean scripts within a few taps.
Emergency flows should prioritize offici: Emergency flows should prioritize official numbers and scripts, not commercial offers.

global_search.title: Search phrases, care, places, and SOS
global_search.help: Use this when you do not remember which tab has a phrase, hospital, refund step, official source, or emergency flow.
global_search.empty: No matching Landly items yet. Try a broader word.
